function: Bifunctional: HMG-CoA reductase (NADPH; HMG-CoA -> mevalonate) and acetyl-CoA acetyltransferase. Modeled as reductase step only in ALT_MVAE.
notes: Heterologous from E. faecalis V583. ID MVAE is non-Cre and does not conflict with any iCre1355 gene. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii expression.

function: Condenses acetyl-CoA and acetoacetyl-CoA to HMG-CoA; first committed step of MVA pathway.
notes: Heterologous from E. faecalis V583. ID MVAS is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.

function: Feedback-resistant mevalonate kinase; phosphorylates mevalonate to mevalonate-5-phosphate. Chosen specifically to prevent product inhibition.
notes: Heterologous from Methanosarcina mazei Go1. Feedback resistance confirmed by Primak et al. 2011 AEM doi:10.1128/aem.05761-11. ID MVK is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.

function: Phosphorylates mevalonate-5-phosphate to mevalonate-5-diphosphate using ATP.
notes: Heterologous from S. cerevisiae. ID PMK is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.

function: ATP-dependent decarboxylation of mevalonate-5-diphosphate to IPP; final step of MVA pathway. Releases pi_c + h_c + co2_c.
notes: Heterologous from S. cerevisiae. ID MVAD is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.

function: Type I IPP isomerase; interconverts IPP and DMAPP to balance isoprenoid precursor pool.
notes: Heterologous from E. coli K-12. iCre1355 already contains native R_IDI (Cre08.g381800.t1.1 OR Cre11.g467544.t1.1). IDLI is added as an additional OR to that GPR rule rather than a new reaction. ID IDLI is non-Cre; no conflict.

function: Epoxidizes squalene to 2-3-oxidosqualene using NADPH and O2. Best-performing SQE in ecFBA screening.
notes: Heterologous from Botryococcus braunii Race B. GenBank BbSQE-I AB923908 / BbSQE-II AB986538 (Uchida et al. 2015 PMC4382194). No KEGG gene entry for B. braunii. ID SQEBb is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.

display_name: squalene epoxidase (CrSQE - C. reinhardtii overexpression copy)
function: Native C. reinhardtii squalene monooxygenase. Overexpression parallel copy to boost SMO reaction flux alongside native Cre17.g734644.t1.1.
notes: Native overexpression copy. Uses exact iCre1355 transcript ID Cre17.g734644.t1.1 — same locus as the SMO gene in the base model. Adding as OR to existing SMO GPR, not a new gene. Codon-optimized sequence with introns (BBa_25FZTRN6).

function: Squalene epoxidase; terbinafine-sensitive fungal enzyme. Comparator to B. braunii SQE in ecFBA screening.
notes: Heterologous from S. cerevisiae ERG1 locus YGR175C. ID SQESc is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized for C. reinhardtii.

function: Two-step condensation of 2x FPP to squalene via presqualene diphosphate; first committed step of sterol branch.
notes: Heterologous from S. cerevisiae ERG9 locus YHR190W. ID SQSSc is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized for C. reinhardtii.

display_name: squalene synthase (CrSQS - C. reinhardtii overexpression copy)
function: Native C. reinhardtii squalene synthase. Overexpression parallel copy to boost PSPPS/SS reaction flux.
notes: Native overexpression copy. Uses exact iCre1355 transcript ID Cre03.g175250.t1.2 (principal transcript; t2.1 also present). Adding as OR to existing PSPPS/SS GPRs. UniProt not yet assigned. Kajikawa et al. 2015 PMC4357444.

function: Thermostable cyanobacterial squalene synthase. Alternative overexpression candidate to S. cerevisiae ERG9.
notes: Heterologous from Thermosynechococcus vestitus BP-1 (KEGG org: tel). KEGG locus tll1448. ID SQSTv is non-Cre; no conflict. Codon-optimized with introns for C. reinhardtii.
